Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model

Class Account

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.Account
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class Account extends Object implements Serializable
Represents an account with entries and a many-to-many relationship with Funds.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Details

    • Account

      public Account()
      Default constructor for Jackson deserialization or JPA.

    • Account

      public Account(String accountNumber, String name, AccountSide increaseSide)
      Constructs an Account with the specified account number, name, and increase side.
      Parameters:
      accountNumber - The account number. Must not be null.
      name - The name of the account.
      increaseSide - The side (Debit or Credit) where the account balance increases.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if accountNumber is null.

    • Account

      public Account(String string, String bankAccountName, AccountType asset, BigDecimal zero)
      Constructor Account
      Parameters:
      string -
      bankAccountName -
      asset -
      zero -

  • Method Details

    • addFund

      public void addFund(String fundId)
      Associates a fund with this account. If the fund is not already associated, it adds the fund to this account's list of associated funds and adds this account to the fund's list of associated accounts.
      Parameters:
      fund - The fund to associate with this account.

    • removeFund

      public void removeFund(String fundId)
      Disassociates a fund from this account. Removes the fund from this account's list of associated funds and removes this account from the fund's list of associated accounts.
      Parameters:
      fund - The fund to disassociate from this account.

    • totalAccountBalance

      public BigDecimal totalAccountBalance(Ledger ledger)
      Calculates the accountâ€™s balance by summing its opening balance and all AccountingEntry records for this account in the provided Ledger.
      Parameters:
      ledger - the ledger containing transactions and entries. If null, only the opening balance is returned
      Returns:
      the calculated balance as a BigDecimal

    • hasParent

      public boolean hasParent()
      Returns:
      true if this account is a child of another.

    • values

      public Collection<Account> values()
      Returns a one-element collection containing this account. The method is here mainly for compatibility with map-like code that expects a Collection<Account>. If you later store sub-accounts directly inside the class, change this to return an unmodifiable view of that list.

    • getAssociatedFundIds

      public List<String> getAssociatedFundIds()
      Gets the list of funds associated with this account.
      Returns:
      The list of associated funds.

    • setAssociatedFundIds

      public void setAssociatedFundIds(List<String> associatedFundIds)
      Sets the list of fund identifiers associated with this account.
      Parameters:
      associatedFundIds - The list of fund IDs to associate.

    • getAccountNumber

      public String getAccountNumber()
      Gets the account number.
      Returns:
      The account number.

    • setAccountNumber

      public void setAccountNumber(String accountNumber)
      Sets the account number.
      Parameters:
      accountNumber - The account number to set.

    • getIncreaseSide

      public AccountSide getIncreaseSide()
      Gets the side (Debit or Credit) where the account balance increases.
      Returns:
      The increase side of the account.

    • getEffectiveIncreaseSide

      public AccountSide getEffectiveIncreaseSide()
      Determines the effective increase side for this account. If an explicit increase side has been set, it is returned. Otherwise the side is derived from the account type and falls back to AccountSide.DEBIT when no type mapping exists.
      Returns:
      the effective increase side, never null

    • setIncreaseSide

      public void setIncreaseSide(AccountSide increaseSide)
      Sets the side (Debit or Credit) where the account balance increases.
      Parameters:
      increaseSide - The increase side to set.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Gets the name of the account.
      Returns:
      The name of the account.

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets the name of the account.
      Parameters:
      name - The name to set.

    • getAccountCode

      public String getAccountCode()
      Gets the account code.
      Returns:
      The account code.

    • setAccountCode

      public void setAccountCode(String accountCode)
      Sets the account code.
      Parameters:
      accountCode - The account code to set.

    • getAccountType

      public AccountType getAccountType()
      Gets the type of the account.
      Returns:
      The account type.

    • setAccountType

      public void setAccountType(AccountType accountType)
      Sets the type of the account.
      Parameters:
      accountType - The account type to set.

    • getParentAccountId

      public String getParentAccountId()
      Gets the parent account of this account, if any.
      Returns:
      The parent account, or null if this is a top-level account.

    • setParentAccountId

      public void setParentAccountId(String parentAccountId)
      Sets the parent account of this account using its account number.
      Parameters:
      parentAccountId - The parent account number to set.

    • getCurrency

      public String getCurrency()
      Gets the currency of the account.
      Returns:
      The currency code (e.g., "USD").

    • setCurrency

      public void setCurrency(String currency)
      Sets the currency of the account.
      Parameters:
      currency - The currency code to set (e.g., "USD").

    • getOpeningBalance

      public BigDecimal getOpeningBalance()
      Gets the opening balance of the account.
      Returns:
      The opening balance.

    • setOpeningBalance

      public void setOpeningBalance(BigDecimal openingBalance)
      Sets the opening balance of the account.
      Parameters:
      openingBalance - The opening balance to set.

    • getSupplementalLineKinds

      public List<SupplementalLineKind> getSupplementalLineKinds()
      Returns the supplemental line kinds associated with this account.
      Returns:
      list of supplemental line kinds (never null)

    • setSupplementalLineKinds

      public void setSupplementalLineKinds(List<SupplementalLineKind> supplementalLineKinds)
      Sets the supplemental line kinds associated with this account.
      Parameters:
      supplementalLineKinds - kinds to set
